text:
Created attachment 199087
collectd5 update to 5.8.1

There is new version of collectd5. I've made a patch. It was tested with poudriere - you can download log at http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing/2018-11-08_21h44m17s/logs/collectd5-5.8.1.log

Thanks a lot for commit it.
